title: Context Tree Redesign — Three-tier Goal > Project > Task hierarchy with clean-slate migration
description: Complete redesign of the .context/ directory structure. Three-tier hierarchy (Goal > Project > Task), embedded tasks in project.json, flat directives with triage linking, kill state/indexer, co-locate context with entities. Definitive spec from 4 brainstorm rounds.

out: sw consumer repo (separate backlog item: sw-consumer-migration)

dod.criterion: All goal.json, project.json, directive.json, backlog.json files conform to SPEC.md schemas
Zero stale path references in SKILL.md and agent .md files
3-agent review (path audit, data integrity, SPEC compliance) passes

checklist: All entity JSON files validate against SPEC.md Section 2 schemas
Zero stale path references across .claude/ directory (grep returns 0)
Every active/pending project has dod and verify fields populated

reviewers.domain: architecture — schema compliance and structural integrity

tasks.title: Create SPEC.md with definitive entity schemas and directory structure
tasks.output: SPEC.md created with full schemas for Goal, Project, Task, Directive, Backlog

tasks.title: Execute agent-conductor migration to new structure
tasks.output: 3 goals (data-model, workflow-orchestration, ui), 18 projects, 35 directives migrated. Branch: directive/context-tree-redesign

tasks.title: Update all 6 SKILL.md files and 8 agent .md files to reference new paths
tasks.output: All 6 SKILL.md + 8 agent files updated. Fixed: lessons.md→lessons/*.md, backlog.md→backlog.json, features/→projects/, intelligence/→intel/

tasks.title: Create CLAUDE.md for agent-conductor repo
tasks.output: CLAUDE.md created with context tree structure and lessons routing table

tasks.title: Verify migration: entity counts, orphan checks, broken references
tasks.output: 3-agent review: Sarah (path audit, 80+ stale refs found+fixed), Marcus (data integrity, PASS), Morgan (SPEC compliance, 3 blocking issues found+fixed)

tasks.title: Change task.agent and dod.verified_by from string to array in SPEC and all project.json files
tasks.output: SPEC.md updated (agent: string→array, verified_by: string→array). All project.json files migrated: context-tree-redesign, dashboard-glob-reads, team-org-dashboard, improve-session-subagent-ui.
